title: dombeya pilosissima
intro: Dombeya pilosissima, also known as the woolly peepul or hairy peepul, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Dombeya pilosissima include the relief of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Dombeya pilosissima include tea and infusions, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water.
